summary: Completed testing of Target Top-K and Confidence Bands features for PaperSumo. All new features working correctly: Target Top-K slider in UCB Parameters, Confidence Level slider (80-99%), backend accepts target_top_k and confidence_level in ucb_config, and Results page displays confidence bands (win rate ± margin of error) for each paper. Fixed a critical bug where float('inf') UCB scores caused JSON serialization errors.

critical.issue: float('inf') UCB scores caused JSON serialization error: 'Out of range float values are not JSON compliant'
critical.fix_applied: Replaced float('inf') with 999999.0 in paper_stats['ucb_score'] before MongoDB update (server.py line 969)

passed_tests: Create UCB tournament with target_top_k parameter
Create UCB tournament with confidence_level range (80-99%)
Default confidence_level is 0.95 when not specified
Default target_top_k is None (rank all papers)
UCB tournament with confidence bands in results
Target Top-K slider appears in UCB Parameters section (UI)
Confidence Level slider appears in UCB Parameters section (UI)
Top 3 podium shows confidence intervals (Win rate: XX% ± YY%)
Complete Rankings show confidence bands with comparison count
UCB Mode badge displayed on Results page
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted multiple test UCB tournaments during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Target Top-K and Confidence Bands features fully implemented and tested. Key changes: 1) UCBConfig now accepts target_top_k (int or null) and confidence_level (float 0.80-0.99). 2) Results API returns rankings with 'confidence' object containing win_rate, lower_bound, upper_bound, margin_of_error, confidence_level, comparisons. 3) Frontend displays confidence as 'XX% ± YY%' in top 3 podium and full rankings. 4) Fixed float('inf') JSON serialization bug in UCB score updates.
